capabilities.name: GitHub private repository creation with approval
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Requires a scoped, active, unexpired owner approval lock naming the exact private repository creation action.
boundaries: Proven only for creating one private GitHub repository after owner approval.
Does not authorize creating additional repositories without a new approval lock.
Does not authorize deployment, Netlify connection, n8n workflow changes, domain/DNS changes, paid tools, credentials, or production/customer data.
capabilities.notes: Capability describes proof already recorded in AG OS. It does not grant standing approval for future repository creation.

capabilities.name: GitHub branch and pull request creation with approval
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Requires owner approval for the exact target repo, branch name, file set, and PR scope.
boundaries: Proven only for creating one branch, adding/updating approved starter files, and opening one PR in the test repository.
Does not authorize merging the PR without separate approval.
Does not authorize deployments, Netlify connection, n8n activation, domain/DNS changes, paid tools, credentials, tracking scripts, live forms, or production/customer data.
capabilities.notes: Proven through the approved test construction website builder milestone.

capabilities.name: Target repository PR review with critique and quality score
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Owner approval is required when the review inspects a live target repository PR or gates a later live merge.
boundaries: Proven for advisory review of a target repo PR with source-controlled audit, critique, quality score, and candidate lesson records.
Critique output is advisory and cannot approve live action.
Quality score status remains candidate unless separately promoted by an approved process.
blockedCapabilities: production/customer data review without explicit approval
capabilities.notes: Proven against the test construction website target PR. It is a review capability, not a merge or deployment capability.

capabilities.name: Target repository PR merge with approval
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Requires owner approval for the exact target repo, PR number, reviewed head SHA, and merge scope.
boundaries: Proven only for merging one reviewed PR after AG OS review records were merged into source of truth.
Requires confirming reviewed files and head SHA are unchanged before merge.
Does not authorize deployment, Netlify activation, domain/DNS changes, n8n changes, paid tools, credentials, or production/customer data.
capabilities.notes: Proven for the test construction website target PR merge only.

capabilities.name: Netlify staging deployment on dedicated staging-only site with approval
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Requires owner approval for the exact repo, source SHA, dedicated staging-only site, and no-domain deployment scope.
boundaries: Proven only for a dedicated staging-only Netlify site.
Netlify production context is recorded only as the primary context of the dedicated staging-only site.
Does not authorize AG Digitalz production deployment, custom domains, DNS changes, paid Netlify features, environment variable values, forms, tracking, or production/customer data.
capabilities.notes: Proven for the test construction website staging-only Netlify milestone. Production deployment remains blocked.

capabilities.name: n8n inactive draft workflow creation and export with approval
capabilities.approvalRequirement: Requires owner approval for the exact inactive workflow purpose, no-credential scope, and no-activation proof.
boundaries: Proven only for creating one inactive draft workflow and exporting source-controlled workflow JSON.
Workflow active status must remain false.

Does not authorize workflow activation, workflow credentials, outbound email/SMS/WhatsApp, real external API calls, production n8n workflow changes, Lead Gen workflow changes, or AI Receptionist workflow changes.
capabilities.notes: Proven after the earlier OAuth-blocked attempt was recorded and preserved. This is draft-only workflow creation/export, not live automation.

capabilities.name: Quality score generation
capabilities.approvalRequirement: No owner approval is required for local plan-only quality score generation; owner approval is required before using a score to justify any gated live action.
boundaries: Proven for source-controlled candidate quality score records.
Quality scores cannot approve live actions, bypass gates, create accepted lessons, or write permanent memory.
Scores remain advisory unless a separate approved workflow promotes their use.
blockedCapabilities: production/customer data scoring without explicit approval
capabilities.notes: Proven for local/candidate scoring records only.

capabilities.name: Lesson candidate generation
capabilities.approvalRequirement: No owner approval is required for local candidate lesson generation; owner approval is required before accepting or promoting any lesson as durable truth.
boundaries: Proven only for candidate lesson records.
Candidate lessons are not accepted truth and are not permanent memory.
Candidate lessons cannot relax security rules, approval gates, cost limits, or live-action restrictions.
capabilities.notes: Proven as candidate-only learning support. Accepted lesson promotion remains blocked without owner approval.

capabilities.name: Critic review generation
capabilities.approvalRequirement: No owner approval is required for local advisory critique generation; owner approval remains required for any gated live action regardless of critique status.
boundaries: Proven only for advisory critique records.
Critique is not approval and cannot bypass approval gates.
Critic cannot edit plans directly, activate live actions, create accepted lessons, or write permanent memory.
capabilities.notes: Proven for advisory critique generation only. Critiques never count as owner approval.

notes: Registry reflects the AG OS v1 builder proof chain through 2026-07-04. Proven capabilities still require their recorded approval gates where applicable. Draft-only or blocked areas remain unproven: production deployment, domain/DNS changes, custom domains, paid Netlify features, n8n activation, n8n credentials, outbound email/SMS/WhatsApp, real external API workflows, live social posting, social account connections, analytics API pulls, production/customer data handling, Lead Gen production management, and AI Receptionist production management.
